chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Transfer Application No.S-21 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 125/2024 2.For hearing of main case 04-03-2024 Applicant is called absent. ***** Applicant, who maintains this application in person, is called absent; same was the position on preceding date of hearing i.e. 15.01.2024. No intimation is received so far. Accordingly, This Civil Transfer Application along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
